subcodes.first_line: O grandson of the Dakhíl! Thy noble forebear was chief among those who remembered God, in all verses and remembrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن ابن الدخیل جد بزرگوارت چون سرخیل ذاکرین بود و در جمیع اشعار و اذکار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
